name: strategy-room
description: Pre-commitment interviews, assumption challenge, option generation, decision synthesis, and uncertainty tracking.

interface.longDescription: Strategy Room routes consequential choices through interview, assumption challenge, option generation, decision synthesis, and assumption tracking, then stops at an explicit execution handoff.
defaultPrompt: Pressure-test this decision before I commit resources.
Generate distinct options and synthesize a recommendation.
Create an assumption register for this choice.
